zh.lifeSummary: 當Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.於1125年出生在英國越可爾瑟斯克時，她的父親Nigel D'Aubigny54歲，母親Gundred de Gournay28歲。她和Bertram Haget至少有1個女兒。她去世於1154年在英國越可爾希阿勞享年29歲，埋葬在英國越可爾白藍德 艾比。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Mowbray.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northern; of Norman origin): habitational name from Montbray (Manche). Robert de Mowbray was Earl of Northumbria 1086–95, but was later imprisoned and deposed for rebelling against William II.

variants.name: Mulberry
meanings: English (Middlesex and Cambridgeshire): variant of   Mowbray  .
Irish (Derry): Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Maoilbhearaigh ‘descendant of the devotee of (Saint) Bearach’.

variants.name: Mayberry
meanings: English: most probably an altered form of   Mowbray  . It is also found as   Maybury  , which has the form of an English habitational name. There is a place near Woking in Surrey so called; however, this is not recorded until 1885 and is probably derived from the surname. In England this surname is found mainly in the West Midlands; it has also spread into Wales. In Ireland this form is common in Ulster; MacLysaght records that it was taken there from England in the 17th century.

en.lifeSummary: When Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. was born in 1125, in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, her father, Nigel D'Aubigny, was 54 and her mother, Gundred de Gournay, was 28. She had at least 1 daughter with Bertram Haget. She died in 1154, in Healaugh, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 29, and was buried in Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. est née en 1125, à Thirsk, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, Nigel D'Aubigny, avait 54 ans et sa mère, Gundred de Gournay, avait 28 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fille avec Bertram Haget. Elle est décédée en 1154, à Healaugh, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterrée à Byland Abbey, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. 1125 in Thirsk, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Nigel D'Aubigny 54 und ihre Mutter Gundred de Gournay 28. Sie hatte mit Bertram Haget mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1154 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Healaugh, Yorkshire, England und wurde in Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. è nata il nel 1125 nel Thirsk, Yorkshire, England, sua padre, Nigel D'Aubigny, aveva 54 anni e sua madre, Gundred de Gournay, aveva 28 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlia con Bertram Haget. Morì nel 1154, nel Healaugh, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolta a Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.が1125年にイギリスヨークシュアイアスイルスクで生まれた時，父Nigel D'Aubignyは54歳，母Gundred de Gournayは28歳であった。彼女はBertram Hagetとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1154年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヒーラウで29歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアブイランド アビーにて埋葬された。

ko.Waxholme, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 이스트 리딩 와스홀
ko.lifeSummary: Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray.(이)가 1125년 영국 요르크실르 스이르스크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Nigel D'Aubigny(은)는 54세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Gundred de Gournay(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 Bertram Haget(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1154년 영국 요르크실르 히로그h에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 빌랜드 애브브이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. nasceu em 1125, em Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Nigel D'Aubigny, tinha 54 anos e sua mãe, Gundred de Gournay, tinha 28 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filha com Bertram Haget. Ela faleceu em 1154, em Healaugh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 29 anos, e foi sepultada em Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. родилась в 1125 г. в местности тирск, еркшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Nigel D'Aubigny было 54 года, а матери, которую звали Gundred de Gournay, 28. У неё была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Bertram Haget. Она умерла в 1154 г. в местности хило, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 29 лет и была похоронена в местности биланд эбби, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gundreda D'Aubigny de Mowbray. nació en 1125, en Thirsk, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Nigel D'Aubigny, tenía 54 años y su mamá, Gundred de Gournay, tenía 28 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Bertram Haget. Murió en 1154, en Healaugh, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultada en Byland Abbey, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
